ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No LC reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-23D-787836' does not contain an LC reference with a separate field label or bank term context. No field labeled 'L/C No.', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar found.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 - footer address line: 'PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, SE-404 30 Gothenburg, Sweden'
Invoice page 2 - body text: 'ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB'

criteria_met: Consignor 'Esswell International AB' identified in invoice (header, footer, body)
Shipping marks match (PIL, SO: 683, In transit, No. 1/-)
pairing_validation.reasoning: Certificate consignor 'Esswell International AB' is expressly identifiable in the invoice as the issuer (ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB in header and footer). The shipping marks in the certificate (P.I.L., SO: 683, IN TRANSIT, NO.1/-) match those in the invoice (PIL, SO: 683, In transit, No. 1/-). The pairing is valid.

rules_applied.rule_description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found expressly in invoice

normalizations_applied: Case normalization (Esswell International AB → esswell international ab)
consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Esswell International AB' is identified as the invoice issuer 'ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB' in the invoice header/logo, footer, and body text. The name matches exactly after case normalization. The address matches: PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, with minor format variation in postal code (SE-40430 vs SE-404 30) and city name variant (GÖTEBORG vs Gothenburg). Country Sweden is confirmed in the invoice footer address and by VAT prefix SE. Rule 4.1.0 gives MATCH.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'Esswell International AB, PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, SE-40430, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice text: 'ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB' in header and footer with address 'PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, SE-404 30 Gothenburg, Sweden'. Name is identical after normalization. Country: Sweden in both. MATCH via 4.1.0.

consignee.invoice_value: Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE, P.O. Box 18225, Jebel Ali, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has a 'Customer/Applicant' field which functions as the billing/buyer field: 'Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE'
comparison_steps.result: Primary billing party identified: Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE, Dubai, UAE

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee 'PICFARE INDUSTRIES LIMITED' against invoice billing party 'Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE'
Search for 'PICFARE INDUSTRIES LIMITED' anywhere in the invoice
comparison_steps.result: NOT FOUND - the name 'PICFARE' does not appear anywhere in the invoice text on any page

comparison_steps.description: Check if consignee appears in Ship-To/Delivery address field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: NOT APPLICABLE - Invoice has no Ship-To or Delivery address field. No mention of PICFARE anywhere.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee country: Uganda. Invoice customer country: United Arab Emirates.

rules_applied.rule_description: Priority order for consignee identification - billing field has priority
Search in all invoice fields for consignee

consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee is 'PICFARE INDUSTRIES LIMITED' in Kampala, Uganda. The invoice's billing/customer field is 'Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE' in Dubai, UAE. These are completely different companies in different countries. The name 'PICFARE' does not appear anywhere in the invoice (searched all pages including headers, footers, shipping marks, and all text blocks). No Ship-To or Delivery address field exists in the invoice. Both company name and country differ. This is a clear MISMATCH.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate: 'PICFARE INDUSTRIES LIMITED, P.O.BOX 9396, KAMPALA, UGANDA'. Invoice Customer/Applicant: 'Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE, P.O. Box 18225, Jebel Ali, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'. Full text search for 'PICFARE' across all invoice pages returned no results. No secondary fields (Ship-To, Delivery, Notify) exist in the invoice. The consignee cannot be identified in the invoice at all. MISMATCH per 4.2.4.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: PICFARE could be a subsidiary or trading partner of Parkinson Clarke
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.2 prohibits assumptions about group relations or agent relationships. The name must be expressly identifiable in the invoice. PICFARE does not appear anywhere.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The consignee might be found in some other field
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Exhaustive search of all invoice text (pages 1 and 2) found no occurrence of 'PICFARE'. No delivery address, ship-to, or notify party field exists in this invoice.

goods_description.certificate_value: NEWSPRINT PAPER 52 GSM 66 CM; NEWSPRINT PAPER 52 GSM 99 CM
goods_description.invoice_value: Bulky Newsprint 52 gsm 66 cm - 38.402 mt / 156 reels; Bulky Newsprint 52 gsm 99 cm - 97.460 mt / 264 reels

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are present in certificate
comparison_steps.result: No article numbers in certificate. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'NEWSPRINT PAPER 52 GSM 66 CM' vs Invoice: 'Bulky Newsprint 52 gsm 66 cm'
comparison_steps.result: Identity-bearing main designation: 'NEWSPRINT 52 GSM 66 CM'. In invoice: 'Newsprint 52 gsm 66 cm'. Core product identifier 'Newsprint 52 gsm 66 cm' matches after case normalization. 'PAPER' in certificate is a non-identity-bearing addition (generic descriptor of the product type). 'Bulky' in invoice is a non-identity-bearing addition (specification/quality descriptor). MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'NEWSPRINT PAPER 52 GSM 99 CM' vs Invoice: 'Bulky Newsprint 52 gsm 99 cm'
comparison_steps.result: Same analysis as Line 1. Core: 'Newsprint 52 gsm 99 cm' matches. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: 'PAPER' (cert) and 'Bulky' (invoice) are additions that do not change product model, variant, quality, or article identity. The identity-bearing main designation 'Newsprint 52 gsm [width] cm' is identifiable in both documents.
comparison_steps.result: Additions do not affect identity. MATCH.

rules_applied.rule_description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation

goods_description.motivation: Certificate lists two products: 'NEWSPRINT PAPER 52 GSM 66 CM' and 'NEWSPRINT PAPER 52 GSM 99 CM'. Invoice lists 'Bulky Newsprint 52 gsm 66 cm' and 'Bulky Newsprint 52 gsm 99 cm'. The identity-bearing main designation for both lines is 'Newsprint 52 gsm [width] cm' which is identifiable in both documents after case normalization. 'PAPER' in the certificate is a generic product type descriptor and 'Bulky' in the invoice is a quality/type specification — both are non-identity-bearing additions per 4.3.4. MATCH.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Cert line 1: 'NEWSPRINT PAPER 52 GSM 66 CM'. Invoice line 1: 'Bulky Newsprint 52 gsm 66 cm'. Core: 'Newsprint' + '52 gsm' + '66 cm' present in both. 'PAPER' is generic descriptor (newsprint IS paper). 'Bulky' is quality specification. Per 4.3.4, these additions do not change product identity. Same analysis for line 2 with '99 cm'. Both lines MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: 'NEWSPRINT PAPER' vs 'Bulky Newsprint' could be different products
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The core product identifier 'Newsprint 52 gsm [width] cm' is identical. 'PAPER' is a generic descriptor (newsprint is a type of paper) and 'Bulky' is a quality specification. Per 4.3.4, these do not change product identity, model, variant, or article identity.

comparison_steps.result: MATCH - exact numeric value 38.402 found with unit MT.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 97.460 MT. Invoice Description of Goods: '97.460 mt' in line 'Bulky Newsprint 52 gsm 99 cm - 97.460 mt / 264 reels'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - exact numeric value 97.460 found with unit MT.
MATCH - numeric value 420 identified in invoice. ROLLS/reels are the same unit.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice total: 135.862 MT net/gross weight. Certificate individual totals: 38.402 + 97.460 = 135.862 MT. Consistent, no contradiction.

rules_applied.rule_description: Direct identification of numeric values in invoice
Multiple quantity entries - at least one verified, no contradictions

quantity.motivation: Certificate Box 7 contains three quantity entries: 38.402 MT, 97.460 MT, and 420 ROLLS. All three values are directly identifiable in the invoice. The per-line weights (38.402 mt, 97.460 mt) appear in the Description of Goods section, and 420 reels appears in the Quantity section. The invoice total of 135.862 MT net/gross weight is consistent with the sum of the two line weights (38.402 + 97.460 = 135.862). No contradictions found. MATCH per 4.4.1 and 4.4.3.1.
quantity.debug_explanation: Cert values: 38.402 MT, 97.460 MT, 420 ROLLS. Invoice: '38.402 mt' (description line 1), '97.460 mt' (description line 2), '420 reels' (quantity field), '135.862 MT net/gross weight' (total). All three cert values found exactly in invoice. 38.402 + 97.460 = 135.862 — consistent with invoice total. MATCH.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate origin field: 'CANADA'. Invoice 'Country of Origin' field: 'Canada'. After normalization both are 'canada'. Exact match. MATCH per 4.5.1 and 4.5.4.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Core designation 'Newsprint 52 gsm 66 cm' and 'Newsprint 52 gsm 99 cm' identifiable in both documents.
'PAPER' and 'Bulky' are non-identity-bearing additions that do not change product identity.
38.402 MT, 97.460 MT, and 420 found in invoice. All values match exactly.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet anger mottagaren som PICFARE INDUSTRIES LIMITED i Kampala, Uganda, men fakturan är ställd till Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE i Dubai, Förenade Arabemiraten. PICFARE förekommer inte någonstans i fakturan. Övriga kontrollpunkter (avsändare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) stämmer överens.
overall_assessment.consolidation_reasoning: Consignor: MATCH. Consignee: MISMATCH — certificate consignee 'PICFARE INDUSTRIES LIMITED' (Uganda) cannot be identified anywhere in the invoice, which lists 'Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE' (UAE) as customer. Goods description: MATCH. Quantity: MATCH. Country of origin: MATCH. Since consignee has MISMATCH, overall result is NOT_IDENTICAL per consolidation rules (at least one critical checkpoint is MISMATCH → NOT_IDENTICAL).

sections.certificate_value: Esswell International AB, PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, SE-40430, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB, PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, SE-404 30 Gothenburg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – Consignor namn identifierat i fakturans sidhuvud och sidfot
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Esswell International AB' återfinns som fakturautställare 'ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB' i fakturans sidhuvud, sidfot och brödtext. Namn, adress och land (Sverige) överensstämmer efter normalisering.

sections.certificate_value: PICFARE INDUSTRIES LIMITED, P.O.BOX 9396, KAMPALA, UGANDA
sections.invoice_value: Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE, P.O. Box 18225, Jebel Ali, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
sections.rule_applied: Konsensverifiering mot primärt faktureringsfält (4.2.0.2, 4.2.2). Fullständig sökning i alla fakturafält (4.2.0.1).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'PICFARE INDUSTRIES LIMITED' i Uganda kan inte identifieras någonstans i fakturan. Fakturans enda kund/mottagare är 'Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE' i Dubai, UAE. Företagsnamnen är helt olika och länderna skiljer sig (Uganda vs UAE). MISMATCH.

sections.certificate_value: NEWSPRINT PAPER 52 GSM 66 CM; NEWSPRINT PAPER 52 GSM 99 CM

sections.invoice_value: 135.862 MT net/gross weight; 420 reels; 38.402 mt (rad 1); 97.460 mt (rad 2)
sections.rule_applied: Direkt förekomstkontroll (4.4.1). Alla tre kvantitetsvärden identifierade i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Alla tre kvantitetsuppgifter i certifikatet (38.402 MT, 97.460 MT, 420 ROLLS) kan identifieras direkt i fakturan. Fakturans total 135.862 MT är konsistent med summan 38.402 + 97.460 = 135.862. Ingen motsägelse. MATCH.

human_readable_report.overall_result: NOT_IDENTICAL — Mottagaren (consignee) i certifikatet kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Certifikatet anger PICFARE INDUSTRIES LIMITED i Uganda medan fakturan anger Parkinson Clarke (Middle East) FZE i UAE.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_details: Consignee checkpoint has status MISMATCH with motivation confirming mismatch. At least one checkpoint has MISMATCH → comparison_result = NOT_IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation = MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED. All consistent.
output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_details: All MATCH checkpoints have confidence ≥ 0.85 (consignor 0.98, goods 0.92, quantity 0.97, origin 0.99). No confidence floor violation.
